channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Fed Chair Warsh expected to withhold 'dot' from central bank's interest rate outlook
item.description: The central bank's Federal Open Market Committee is set to release its quarterly update of where individual officials expect interest rates to head.

item.title: 'A signal of where power sits': Trump and world leaders joined by OpenAI, Anthropic, Google at G7
item.description: Frontier AI risks, infrastructure and sovereignty are all expected to be discussed at the world leaders' summit.

item.title: Carvana is expanding into new vehicles. The implications could reshape the U.S. automotive retail market
item.description: Carvana has bought seven new vehicle franchises since last year that primarily sell Stellantis' Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep and Ram brands.

item.title: Central banks are bringing gold reserves home as geopolitical risks rise
item.description: Central banks expect gold reserves to rise and more are storing bullion at home amid geopolitical and currency risks.

item.title: Ineos and Daimler Truck enlist in auto defense push as Europe bolsters military spending
item.description: The partnership is one of a spate of auto-defense collaborations announced in recent weeks.

item.title: Three Iranian tankers exit U.S. blockade for first time in months as shipowners eye Hormuz in 'wary disbelief'
item.description: At least three Iranian tankers carrying nearly five million barrels of crude oil have exited the U.S. Navy blockade.

item.title: CNBC Daily Open: AI protectionism opens new front for G7
item.description: G7 attention shifts to AI as the U.S. imposes protectionist policies on access to certain models.

item.title: Michael Burry says he's tempted to bet against SpaceX, but passes on expensive options
item.description: Burry argued the company's market capitalization had reached levels that dwarf many established businesses and fortunes.

item.title: New Wharton forecast puts Social Security trust fund depletion later than official projections
item.description: Social Security's retirement trust fund may dry up in February 2033, according to a new report from the Penn Wharton Budget Model shared exclusively with CNBC.

item.title: 'Godfather' of options sees SpaceX surpassing Nvidia, Tesla as early trades come in
item.description: SpaceX options are officially listed, and they're off to the races.

item.title: Bill limiting investors from buying homes set to speed through Congress
item.description: Top lawmakers reached an agreement on a key housing bill that would limit investor ownership, clearing the way for passage through both chambers of Congress.

item.title: UK inflation holds steady at 2.8% in May
item.description: The Bank of England is due to update its monetary policy on Thursday.

item.title: Japan May exports grow at fastest pace in over three years, beating estimates, as chip demand soars
item.description: Japan's exports in May grew at their fastest pace since November 2022, boosted by robust demand for cars and semiconductors.

item.title: Databricks sales growth tops 80%, but margin are shrinking from swarm of AI agents
item.description: Databricks is seeing higher growth as AI agents assist with data analysis, but all that activity is significantly increasing costs.

item.title: Telegram's Durov says India punishing 150 million users after country temporarily bans messaging app
item.description: India has temporarily restricted access to the messaging app Telegram in an effort to prevent exam fraud. Telegram has slammed the ban.

item.title: Intel begins production of most-advanced chip, inching closer to possible Apple deal
item.description: Intel is entering production of 18A-P, its most-advanced chip node that could be the target of a coming deal with Apple

item.title: SpaceX options debut signals 'expensive' and 'dangerous' bets, strategist says
item.description: Options on SpaceX have started trading after the company's IPO, and they show a wide variation in bets.

item.title: SpaceX's blistering start still faces key tests that will determine the stock's true value
item.description: SpaceX's stock has yet to face true price discovery.

item.title: Anthropic's Fable shutdown is a big moment for open-source AI
item.description: Anthropic’s Fable shutdown could boost open-source AI, but many of the models gaining traction are Chinese.

item.title: Technical factors are adding fuel to SpaceX's meme stock fire
item.description: Options, leveraged ETFs and index arbitrage are likely boosting the stock ahead of its inclusion in some benchmark stock indexes.

item.title: Jim Cramer says SpaceX investors aren't buying earnings — they're buying Elon Musk
item.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said SpaceX investors are betting on Elon Musk's vision and track record, rather than the company's current earnings power.

item.title: SpaceX rises 4% to leapfrog Amazon in market cap, closes short of Microsoft
item.description: CEO Elon Musk said Sunday that the company "might be able to reach approximately" $1 trillion revenue in 2030.

item.title: How Roku fits into Fox's future — and what investors are missing about the deal
item.description: Fox's stock dropped following its announcement that it will acquire Roku for $22 billion. Analysts still think it's a good deal.

item.title: Cramer's lightning round: Buy Cava
item.description: "Mad Money" host Jim Cramer rings the lightning round bell, which means he's giving his answers to callers' stock questions at rapid speed.

item.title: DOJ assists Musk's xAI in NAACP air pollution suit, asks court to toss case
item.description: The DOJ is asking a Mississippi federal court to dismiss a lawsuit filed by the NAACP against Elon Musk's xAI, now owned by SpaceX.

item.title: Snap unveils $2,195 AR glasses as CEO Evan Spiegel bets on post-smartphone future
item.description: Snap is launching its first AR glasses geared toward the broader public instead of developers.

item.title: Veteran traders stunned as SpaceX fans bet on 80% overnight gains: 'I've never seen anything like it'
item.description: Believers in Elon Musk's astronomic vision for SpaceX are storming options.

item.title: Trump signals he could send details of Iran deal to Congress
item.description: The peace deal announced Sunday is meeting lukewarm reactions from Congress, including some allies of President Donald Trump.

item.title: The new oil? Inside the effort to turn AI computing power into a tradeable commodity
item.description: AI compute futures could eventually rival some of the world's largest commodity markets, Silicon Data's Carmen Li believes.

item.title: Odds that a proposed billionaire tax appears on California ballots plunge on prediction markets
item.description: Odds that a proposed billionaire tax is on California's ballot dropped after reports noted that Gov. Gavin Newsom is pushing to stop the proposal.
